mapper.select: SELECT O.order_seq AS orderSeq , O.user_seq AS userSeq , O.de_num AS deNum , O.total_price AS totalPrice , O.order_status AS orderStatus , TO_CHAR(O.order_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS orderDate , D.receiver_name AS receiverName , D.address AS address , D.detail_address AS detailAddress , D.phone1 AS phone1 FROM ORDER_MASTER O JOIN DELIVERY D ON O.de_num = D.de_num WHERE O.user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY O.order_date DESC

SELECT D.detail_seq AS detailSeq , D.order_seq AS orderSeq , D.item_seq AS itemSeq , D.quantity AS quantity , D.unit_price AS unitPrice , I.item_name AS itemName , I.savefilename AS saveFileName FROM ORDER_DETAIL D JOIN SHOP_ITEM I ON D.item_seq = I.item_seq WHERE D.order_seq = #{orderSeq}
